national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Offramp
buyers.payout_claims: 80–90% of melt value, published on the homepage comparison table; 48-hour price lock with published terms
buyers.testing_transparency: Every final price comes from an assay you can watch — the recorded assay reading is the published pricing basis, not an on-request extra.
buyers.evidence_notes: Scored tier buyer (see buyers.ts): publishes payout rate before you ship, $25,000 insured FedEx kit stated unconditionally, free insured returns in writing, live-spot calculators for every karat. New company: no review history yet, Texas dealer registration in progress. Austin office is by-appointment only.

buyers.name: ATX Jewelry Exchange
buyers.address: 7951 Shoal Creek Blvd, Suite 250, Austin, TX 78757
buyers.payout_claims: No rate posted; "we base our offer on the current spot price plus your gold's exact karat and weight, and we walk you through the math right at the counter"
buyers.testing_transparency: Weighs on certified scales and walks the customer through the spot-price math at the counter; purity-testing method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Site: "No hidden fees or commissions... The price we quote during your appraisal is the exact amount you'll receive." Appointment-only private office in the PNC Bank Building; BBB and Chamber of Commerce badges displayed; footer references "Licenses & Certificates" without detail.

buyers.name: Hill Country Gold
buyers.payout_claims: "some of the best cash payouts for gold and jewelry in central Texas" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Claims "over ten years of precious metal and estate jewelry experience"; pays cash for gold, silver, coins, luxury watches, fine jewelry, flatware, bullion, and diamonds, and offers gold and silver refining services. Walk-ins and appointments both accepted.

buyers.name: Austin Rare Coins & Bullion
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site; NGC/PCGS third-party grading affiliations for coins.
buyers.evidence_notes: "Since 1989" — Austin's longest-tenured precious metals dealer found; BBB A+ badge displayed; dedicated "Sell To Us" flow. Appointment-required office, primarily bullion and rare/ancient coins rather than scrap jewelry.

buyers.name: Capital Coin & Bullion
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Established 2009 per site; "Most of our inventory is bought directly from the public." Posts separate buying hours (no buying on Saturdays). Publishes an anti-scam warning that they never cold-call.

buyers.name: DJP Jewelers & Luxury Buyers
buyers.payout_claims: "we guarantee the best price — no lowball offers" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: "On-site appraisal testing by our expert staff" — method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: "For over four decades, DJP Jewelers has built a reputation as trusted Texas coin buyer"; "no hidden fees or charges." Walk-ins welcome, appointments encouraged.

buyers.name: Fast-Fix Jewelry and Watch Repair (Barton Creek Square)
buyers.address: 2901 S Capital of Texas Hwy, Ste J12, Austin, TX 78746
buyers.payout_claims: "top-paying, same-day gold buyers" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: "We will accurately test the exact karat content in any gold piece... We do all of our testing right in front of you." Free stone removal while you watch.
buyers.evidence_notes: Locally operated franchise inside Barton Creek Square mall; "over 30 years" as a business, "ownership has 60 years of experience in the jewelry industry." Buys scrap gold/platinum, coins, bullion, dental gold, broken jewelry. Store hours not posted on the page (mall hours apply).

buyers.name: Austin's Best Coin and Gold Exchange
buyers.address: 309 West Main St, Ste 116, Round Rock, TX 78664
buyers.hours: By appointment; walk-ins welcome between appointments (hours not posted)
buyers.payout_claims: "pays more than ever for coins and collections in any condition" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Founded 2009, claims "20+ years" industry experience with rare coins; private one-on-one appointments in Round Rock (north Austin metro). No posted hours, fees, or testing detail.

buyers.name: ATX Cash 4 Gold
buyers.payout_claims: Claims to "pay more than pawn shops and online buyers" and offer "highest payouts" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described; site references careful appraisal without technical detail.
buyers.evidence_notes: South Austin walk-in storefront with same-day cash. Weak self-published evidence: the site's experience counter renders as a "0 + Years Experience" placeholder, and no hours, fees, licensing, or testing info is posted.
